# Auto-generated README (Round 1)

**Project brief:** design a dungeon and dragons campaign following the standard ruleset available on the official website of dungeons and Dragons .( https://www.dndbeyond.com/sources/dnd/br-2024 )The setting of the campaign should be such that the player has possibilities to either save the world or take the chaos as as opportunity to takeover the world 
The campaign should be able to be played solo and the website should also have the options to roll dice
